$schema-comment: Per-package + aggregate coverage floors enforced by scripts/run-all-tests.ts (which forwards them to scripts/merge-lcov.ts as --threshold-line / --threshold-function / --per-package-floor). Fractions in [0,1]. Ratchet UP only — each milestone in .shogo/plans/backend-coverage-to-100_*.plan.md raises the floor for the package(s) it touched so coverage can never silently regress. See COVERAGE_EXCLUSIONS.md for policy. Baseline established 2026-05-19 from a clean strict merge of every package's lcov shard after applying excludeDirs (dist/build/generated and the merge-lcov DEFAULT_EXCLUDE_DIRS).
